title: VANLIFE Website
description: Built a web application with Firebase authentication, including a user dashboard and full CRUD functionality with persistent data management.

title: PrintForge Website
description: Developed a 3D printing platform with dynamic content rendering, category-based filtering, and a responsive UI built with a component-based architecture.

title: GoRural Website
description: Built the GoRural web experience using React, translating a Figma design into a fully functional and responsive website.

title: Donuts App
description: Developed a dynamic product management application with React, enabling creation, deletion, and persistence of items in a remote database.

title: Hangman Game
description: Built an interactive Hangman game using TypeScript, implementing structured game logic, input validation, and a reusable component architecture.

title: Chef Claude
description: Developed a React application that generates recipes based on user-input ingredients, leveraging AI-driven logic for content generation.

title: Pokemon App
description: Built a multi-page Pokémon application using Next.js, integrating external API data with structured rendering and navigation between views.

title: Meme Generator
description: Developed a React-based meme generator that overlays user text onto dynamically fetched images, including unit testing with Vitest.

title: Memory Game
description: Built an accessible React memory game with configurable settings and API-driven emoji data, focusing on usability and accessibility.

title: Dashboard
description: Developed a real-time dashboard displaying dynamic data from multiple APIs including weather, Bitcoin, location, and date information.

title: Budget App
description: Built a budgeting application for managing income and expenses, featuring real-time balance calculation and data overview.

title: Tenzies
description: Developed an interactive dice game where players hold values strategically until all numbers match, implementing core game logic in JavaScript.

title: Cards War
description: Built a card game using an external API to generate a deck, where players compete by comparing drawn card values.

title: Blackjack Game
description: Developed an interactive Blackjack game with button-driven gameplay and structured game logic using JavaScript.

title: Films Selector
description: Built a movie search application with filtering, grid/list views, and dynamic data fetching from an external API.

title: Activity Booking App
description: Designed a mobile app prototype in Figma focused on simplifying activity discovery and booking flows.

title: Movie Website
description: Built a movie information website using semantic HTML and CSS with a focus on clean layout and usability.

title: Movie Data Page
description: Developed a movie details page using HTML and CSS, focusing on structured layout and visual clarity.
